log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Hadozee — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Armored Tank with Greataxe: [d20:2+9=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Armored Tank with Greataxe: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 27 damage. Hadozee — Armored Tank HP: 32/59
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Hadozee — Armored Tank with Greatclub: [d20:2+6=8 vs AC 20] MISS.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Hadozee — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Armored Tank with Greataxe: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 48 damage. Hadozee — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
→ Hadozee — Armored Tank loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 12 vs DC 24]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
